sizing_rule.note: Optimal f of 0.25 means 1 contract per $4 in account equity. Position size = Total Equity × 0.25. Formula: Contracts = Account Equity / (Maximum Loss per Contract / optimal f)

source_rule_text: Position size should be determined by optimal f value, where optimal f of 0.25 means making 1 bet for every $4 in equity.
